description: This watch from puma comes in a clean sleek design. This active watch is perfect for urban wear and can serve you well in the gym or a night of clubbing.Case diameter: 35 mmCase thickness: 10 mmDial shape: SquareWarranty: 2 YearsMetal case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with cat logo below 6 o& rsquo clock on the strapDigital dial showing hours, minutes, seconds, month, date, weekday, chronograph, lap recall and lightQuartz movement of time display Acrylic dial window gives better durabilityButtons on the sides to reset time and featuresSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant
